label: session render
note: any /plan or /execute close renders <name>.html into data_root/viz (local staging)

label: plugin upload
note: push.py POSTs report+slides to secondfoundationlabs.com/api/upload with the installer's token (opt-in, fail-silent)

label: Worker /api/upload
note: validates the signed token -> writes R2 key <namespace>/<project>.html

label: R2 store
note: one bucket, each tenant's reports under their own namespace prefix

label: browser login
note: installer opens the domain -> Cloudflare Access (Google/GitHub) -> identity to the Worker

label: Worker serve
note: GET / = the caller's index; GET /<project>.html = the caller's report from R2, scoped to their namespace
